claim: NLRP12 is a positive regulator of T-cell receptor activation.

result.claim: NLRP12 is a positive regulator of T-cell receptor activation.
result.reasoning: Multiple searches were conducted using various keywords related to "NLRP12," "T-cell receptor activation," and "immune regulation." The searches included direct queries of the claim, as well as breaking down the claim into its core components (e.g., "NLRP12 T-cell receptor," "NLRP12 immune regulation," "NLRP12 T cell," "NLRP12 inflammasome T cell"). While the searches returned propositions and chunks related to T-cell activation, immune regulation, and other inflammasomes (like NLRP3), none of the retrieved results directly mentioned NLRP12 as a positive regulator of T-cell receptor activation. There is no direct evidence in the knowledge base to support or refute the claim.
